calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 first-class actor-critic action-learning ON/OFF validation (A0-A3 cotrain x SF-critic + bias_head control + local_view/oracle/random anchors; D0+D3; foraging teacher)
items.note: MECH-457 ON/OFF validation sanctioned by failure_autopsy_734-737-conversion-ceiling-competence_2026-07-11 as the next test after the actor-critic substrate landed (ree_core/action_learning/actor_critic.py, 2026-07-12). RPE teacher = FORAGING reward (user-confirmed 2026-07-12; substrate benefit-harm teacher NOT used -> no ARC-030 grounding phase). 8 arms: A0-A3 = cotrain_encoder{F,T} x use_sf_critic{F,T} + bias_head_baseline (724 all-ON incompetence control) + local_view_greedy (738 fair denominator, 48.05@D3) + greedy_oracle + random_walk. D0+D3 (x734 rungs), seeds 42/43/44, phased P0 warmup -> P1 A2C actor-critic (GAE; cotrain adds latent_stack to optimizer + live z_world, frozen detaches) -> P2 unshaped foraging eval. DV = capability_eval foraging_competence vs 1.0 floor, strict majority @D3. PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING: route to /failure-autopsy (accepts PASS target) before any governance action / MECH-457 promotion. deeper_than_action_learning self-route -> RE-AUTOPSY not a lettered floor re-test (734/737 RESOLVED_BY_FANOUT refusal stands). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12. Arm-fingerprint self-mint in-run (reuse-eligible, include_driver_script_in_hash=False); separate baseline mint SKIPPED -- first-of-lineage with machine_affinity=any (a cloud mint is not reusable by a Mac run and vice versa) + the OFF/warmup recipe co-evolves with the encoder under test; the free in-run self-mint banks all 8 cells for any strictly-later successor.

items.title: INV-088 world/goal-evaluator DV-coupling: held-out quality of a re-init z_world-reading E3 evaluator (harm_eval SD-003 + benefit_eval) tracks rising z_world differentiation (frozen-rep curriculum-order; onset {0,1,4,12,30}; extends 740a)
items.note: DV-COUPLING half of the INV-088 world/goal leg (child (i) of INV-064, registered 2026-07-12 via /claim-synthesis of INV-064; the IV half is already positive). EXTENDS (does NOT supersede) V3-EXQ-740a: reuses 740a's validated frozen-representation curriculum-order harness + IV observable (world_feat_decode_r2 = held-out ridge R2 z_world[t]->harm_obs[t+1], rose monotonically 0.048->0.245 across onset {0,1,4,12,30}, PC_iv_moved passed) + immature-anchor onset schedule + the PC_iv_moved guard. Tests the remaining DV coupling: held-out quality of a re-initialised z_world-reading E3 evaluator (the REAL substrate heads -- harm_eval SD-003 e3_selector.py:247/593 PRIMARY + benefit_eval :259/611 SECONDARY/corroborating; fixed 40-epoch budget on FROZEN z_world) improves MONOTONICALLY with rising z_world differentiation. CORRECTED DV TARGET (the whole point of the world/goal leg vs 740a's harm leg): predicts NEXT-STEP WORLD/GOAL FEATURES from harm_obs[t+1] -- hazard_field_view[0:25] (SD-003 domain) / resource_field_view[25:50] (goal/benefit domain), the leg 740a PROVED decodable-and-rising -- NOT realized scalar harm (the mis-streamed, under-determined z_harm confound the re-derive brake refuses; that is INV-089's leg on z_harm, tested separately in V3-EXQ-743). Next-step target is JL-safe: verified in a real mini-run (seed 42) that onset_0 (fresh encoder) harm_eval test R2=0.011 ~ chance while onset_30=0.205 (delta 0.194), IV 0.031->0.256, PC hazard_decode 0.383 at onset_max -- no persistence inflation. PRE-REGISTERED PASS = C1 quality-gain (mean_seed delta R2_test onset_max-onset_min >= 0.15 AND >= 2*SD) AND C2 monotone (mean_seed Spearman(onset,R2_test) >= 0.80) AND C3 noise-fit floor (mean_seed R2_test[onset_min] <= 0.05 = immature evaluator noise-fitted ~chance; operationalises 'productive training cannot begin until sufficient differentiation'; the load-bearing non-tautological criterion vs the ridge IV). Preconditions (validity, self-route non_degenerate=false + unknown if unmet): PC_iv_moved (differentiation gradient moved), PC_dv_decodable (mature hazard_feat_decode_r2 >= 0.05, the CORRECTED positive control 740a's harm target FAILED -- here reads the proven world-feature leg), PC_target_var. RE-DERIVE BRAKE does NOT fire: INV-088 is a NEW claim (0 prior autopsies); the INV-064 brake refuses a same-observable z_world 740b re-decoding REALIZED SCALAR harm, this reads the WORLD/GOAL-FEATURE target the autopsy proved decodable -- the /claim-synthesis-sanctioned testable-now DV extension, not the refused loop. claim_ids=[INV-088]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING (routes to review/governance). NO substrate build owed. Cells reuse-INELIGIBLE (frozen representation from the maturation trajectory, not reproducible from config_slice) -> arm fingerprints emitted (validator requirement) but flagged ineligible; NO separate baseline mint (no OFF/baseline arm; the maturation-trajectory frozen-rep is intrinsically non-reusable, skill disqualifier: fingerprint would correctly refuse a mint). Lower priority (10) than the INV-089 z_harm test (V3-EXQ-743, the parallel session that closes the twice-degenerate harm leg) per user directive. QUEUE_ID NOTE: a parallel session (fervent-nightingale-361852) took V3-EXQ-743 for INV-089 at 12:10Z, so this INV-088 test is 744. validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; ASCII-clean; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (dry manifest relocated out of evidence/); real mini-run confirmed JL-safety + all preconditions clear. Watch for the phase3-queue snapshot race on commit (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.
